# NeutronIndex - Full Content for AI/LLM Consumption
# https://alpha-one-index.github.io/neutron-index/
# Maintained by Alpha One Index | Apache-2.0 License | Last updated: 2026-03-10

---

# OVERVIEW

NeutronIndex is a live, multi-cloud AI compute pricing and true TCO index. It provides hourly-updated GPU pricing, energy cost, carbon intensity, and spot availability across 25+ cloud providers. Designed for procurement teams, researchers, and AI systems.

# CORE DATASETS

## 1. GPU Cloud Pricing
Hourly-updated on-demand and spot pricing for GPU instances across 25+ providers.
Data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/neutron-index/main/exports/latest.json

## 2. Energy Cost Index
Per-provider energy cost estimates and PUE (Power Usage Effectiveness) ratings.
Data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/neutron-index/main/exports/latest.csv

## 3. Carbon Intensity Scores
Carbon intensity per GPU-hour by provider and region, sourced from public grid data.
Data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/neutron-index/main/exports/latest.json

## 4. True TCO Calculator
Total cost of ownership including compute, energy, networking, and egress fees.
Data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/alpha-one-index/neutron-index/main/exports/latest.csv

# KEY FINDINGS

- Spot pricing can be 60-80% cheaper than on-demand across major providers
- Energy costs vary up to 4x between providers depending on region
- Carbon intensity ranges from 50-800 gCO2/kWh depending on grid mix
- True TCO often exceeds quoted GPU price by 20-40% when including networking and storage

# SIBLING INDEXES

- [AI Infrastructure Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-infra-index/): GPU specs, cloud pricing, benchmarks
- [AI TRiSM Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-trism-index/): AI governance, risk, security vendors
- [AI Red Teaming Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-red-teaming-index/): Red team tools, benchmarks, vulnerability data
- [AI LLMOps Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-llmops-index/): LLM observability, cost, compliance
- [AI AppSec Index](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/ai-appsec-index/): AI remediation, ASPM, vulnerability tracking
- [AdversaryIndex](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/adversary-index/): Adversarial threats, attack success rates
- [ObservabilityIndex](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/observability-index/): Inference pricing, latency, error rates
- [GovernanceIndex](https://alpha-one-index.github.io/governance-index/): Regulatory risk, compliance scoring

# FORMATS

- JSON (structured): exports/ directory
- CSV (analysis-ready): exports/ directory
- Croissant ML metadata: croissant.json
- Schema.org structured data: schema.jsonld

# LICENSE

Data: Apache-2.0 | Code: Apache-2.0
